AllMapped.message:

        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E r \in results :
                /\ r.tla_op = Tokens[k].tla
    ...

HelperAlwaysEmpty.message: HelperAlwaysEmpty violation: \A r \in results : r.helper = FALSE
